Insert Heats (Dynamically select event ID)\nDO $$\nDECLARE\n    eid uuid;\nBEGIN\n    SELECT id INTO eid FROM public.events WHERE slug = 'lexus-pipe-pro-2024' LIMIT 1;\n    \n    INSERT INTO public.heats (event_id, round_number, heat_number, status)\n    VALUES\n        (eid, 1, 1, 'UPCOMING'),\n        (eid, 1, 2, 'UPCOMING'),\n        (eid, 1, 3, 'UPCOMING');\nEND $$","ParameterOIDs":null}

2026/03/08 15:08:21 PG Send: {"Type":"Parse","Name":"","Query":"-- Consolidated Fix for Events Schema \u0026 RLS\n-- Updated: Uses UUID for surfer_id\n-- Updated: Ensures 'gender' column exists\n\n-- 1. Ensure Tables Exist\ncreate table if not exists public.events (\n  id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,\n  created_at timestamp with time zone default timezone('utc'::text, now()) not null,\n  name text not null,\n  slug text unique not null,\n  status text default 'UPCOMING',\n  start_date timestamp with time zone,\n  end_date timestamp with time zone\n)","ParameterOIDs":null}
2026/03/08 15:08:21 PG Send: {"Type":"Bind","DestinationPortal":"","PreparedStatement":"","ParameterFormatCodes":null,"Parameters":[],"ResultFormatCodes":[]}
2026/03/08 15:08:21 PG Send: {"Type":"Describe","ObjectType":"P","Name":""}
2026/03/08 15:08:21 PG Send: {"Type":"Execute","Portal":"","MaxRows":0}
2026/03/08 15:08:21 PG Send: {"Type":"Parse","Name":"","Query":"create table if not exists public.heats (\n  id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,\n  event_id uuid references public.events(id) on delete cascade not null,\n  round_number int not null,\n  heat_number int not null,\n  status text default 'UPCOMING',\n  created_at timestamp with time zone default timezone('utc'::text, now()) not null\n)","ParameterOIDs":null}
2026/03/08 15:08:21 PG Send: {"Type":"Bind","DestinationPortal":"","PreparedStatement":"","ParameterFormatCodes":null,"Parameters":[],"ResultFormatCodes":[]}
2026/03/08 15:08:21 PG Send: {"Type":"Describe","ObjectType":"P","Name":""}
2026/03/08 15:08:21 PG Send: {"Type":"Execute","Portal":"","MaxRows":0}
2026/03/08 15:08:21 PG Send: {"Type":"Parse","Name":"","Query":"create table if not exists public.scores (\n  id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,\n  heat_id uuid references public.heats(id) on delete cascade not null,\n  -- Using UUID for surfer_id based on error report (was bigint)\n  surfer_id uuid references public.surfers(id) not null,\n  wave_score numeric not null,\n  is_best_wave boolean default false,\n  created_at timestamp with time zone default timezone('utc'::text, now()) not null\n)","ParameterOIDs":null}

Update Surfers Table (if not already done)\nalter table public.surfers \nadd column if not exists status text default 'ACTIVE',\nadd column if not exists current_season_points numeric default 0,\nadd column if not exists gender text check (gender in ('Male', 'Female'))","ParameterOIDs":null}

ERROR: foreign key constraint "heat_assignments_surfer_id_fkey" cannot be implemented (SQLSTATE 42804)
Key columns "surfer_id" and "id" are of incompatible types: uuid and bigint.                          
At statement: 0                                                                                       
-- Admin Enhancements: Delete Policies & Heat Assignments                                             
                                                                                                      
-- 1. Create heat_assignments table (for Heat Draws)                                                  
create table if not exists public.heat_assignments (                                                  
  id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,                                                      
  heat_id uuid references public.heats(id) on delete cascade not null,                                
  surfer_id uuid references public.surfers(id) not null,                                              
  created_at timestamp with time zone default timezone('utc'::text, now()) not null,                  
  unique(heat_id, surfer_id)                                                                          
)
